app.colorHexHint: Stored as palette swatch: {{name}} (nearest to your input).
app.colorSwatchesHint: Recently picked colors first, then the full palette. HEX and the native picker stay in sync with the swatches.
app.backlogHint: Clear the date or use “Backlog only” so the task is not tied to a day.
app.estimateHint: For a task with a planned date (not backlog), enter hours and/or minutes. Minutes are 0–59; total at most 24 h.
app.estimateRequiredWhenPlanned: Tasks with a planned date need a time estimate.
app.estimateInvalid: Use whole numbers: hours ≥ 0, minutes 0–59, total at most 24 h.
app.confirmDeleteTaskWithChecklist: This task has checklist items. Delete it and them?
app.doubleConfirmEnable: Require a second confirmation before counting as done
app.doubleConfirmHintShort: First tap starts the timer; confirm again before the window closes, or the completion is not recorded.
app.doubleConfirmHintEdit: Interval is the wait before the second prompt; grace is how long after that you can still confirm. Empty fields use defaults (+10 / +30 minutes).
app.doubleConfirmPendingInEditor: Waiting for the second confirmation for this day. You can cancel and try again from the card.
app.overlapConfirm: This overlaps another task by about {{minutes}} minutes. Continue?
app.completionOnlyToday: You can only toggle completion on calendar today — switch to Today’s day view.
app.createTaskCloseHintPristine: No task will be created and nothing will be saved to drafts.
app.createTaskCloseHintDraft: Your edits will be saved to Drafts. Date/time rules are not applied to drafts—fix them before the final save.
app.createTaskCloseHintLost: Editing is disabled — unsaved changes will be lost.
app.createTaskSaveRequirementsBodyPlanned: task title and a valid time estimate (hours and/or minutes).
app.createTaskPastDate: The planned date cannot be in the past.
app.createTaskPastClockToday: For today’s date, start or end time cannot be before now.
app.createTaskEstimateExceedsDay: With this start time, the estimate runs past midnight — the task doesn’t fit in the same calendar day.
app.createTaskEstimateExceedsDayEnd: With this end time, the estimate doesn’t fit in the same day (work would start before midnight).
app.recurrenceAnchorPast: The series anchor date can’t be in the past (relative to today’s local date).
app.estimateExceedsRestOfCalendarDay: The estimate is longer than the rest of the calendar day until midnight. Set a start/end time or reduce the estimate. (Custom working hours will come later.)
app.recurrenceEditHint: Day-by-day completion resets when you change the recurrence rule or anchor date.
app.weekGridHint: Slots show tasks with start or end time and duration (default 30 min if estimate missing). Tasks completed for that calendar day are hidden (including recurring tasks marked done that day).

settings.title: Settings
settings.seedHint: Seed is stored locally. Copy it on onboarding or add export later.
settings.cannotDeleteDefault: The default group cannot be deleted.
settings.priorityLabelsHelp: Shown on tasks and filters. Stored in your encrypted vault.
settings.accountPasswordHelp: For Supabase email login. Your current password is verified before setting a new one.
settings.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
settings.passwordSameAsOld: New password matches the current one.
settings.roadmapIntro: Five collapsible sections: shipped (phases 0–6), plan to 1.0.0 (phases 7–11), tester release notes, post-release ideas, open product questions. Roadmap and release-note content lives in src/data/productRoadmap.ts.
settings.roadmapImplementedHint: Phases 0–6 per the MVP plan; open “Details” under each phase for task bullets.
settings.roadmapMvpHint: Remaining work to 1.0.0 per obsidian-motivator/17-План-реализации-MVP.md. Under each phase summary there’s an “In simple words” line. Open “Details” for bullets inside each phase.
settings.roadmapReleaseNotesHint: Changelog by date — each date is its own collapsible; no GitHub needed. Data lives in RELEASE_NOTES_BLOCKS (productRoadmap.ts).
settings.roadmapMvpProgressCaption: {{pct}}% · {{done}} of {{total}} roadmap phases shipped (0–6 done, 7–11 planned to release)
settings.roadmapIdeasHint: No fixed dates; priority will be revised after MVP.
settings.roadmapOpenQuestionsHint: Product notes without a deadline — not the release checklist.
settings.roadmapOpenQuestionBacklogUx: How should we gently surface a large backlog (dozens of tasks): summary, capped list, dedicated screen — without pressure in the “not closed for today” block?
settings.roadmapOpenQuestionCpt: Typing reflection answers in-app is planned post-MVP; see “Ideas for later” in this same modal.
settings.eodHelp: Evening closure and DR-013 streak accounting. Turn off if you do not use the ritual.
settings.eodToggle: Show End-of-Day button in the planner header
settings.adminSectionHelp: Assign roles server-side (Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → user → User Metadata → app_metadata key motivator_role). Values: admin, beta_tester, or omit for a normal user. Invites UI or an Edge Function can follow per MVP phase 8. The section below is for admins; the “Brief summary” button in settings is available to every signed-in user.

eod.title: End of day
eod.intro: First, your **plan for this calendar day**: wins and what’s still open. Completing the ritual is saved to your vault and needed for a full DR-013 streak.
eod.emptyRemaining: Everything planned for today is closed or excluded from the ritual.
eod.backlogIntro: Tasks **without a planned date** are not treated as “not closed for the day.” They’re a separate bucket worth revisiting when you can.
eod.chartEmptyPlan: No tasks planned for this day — the ring shows an empty outline.
eod.alreadyDone: This day’s ritual is already marked complete.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Computed on-device after decrypting the vault (DR-007). Completion marks include today; the daily chart covers completed calendar days through yesterday.
reports.kpiStreakHint: DR-013 streak: requires a completed End-of-Day ritual for each day in the chain plus the day-plan rule (see decision log).
reports.kpiCompletionRate: Days with at least one completion
reports.hintKpiStreak: How many consecutive calendar days ending today satisfy DR-013: End-of-Day ritual completed for each day in the chain and the day-plan rule (when there are planned tasks).
reports.hintKpiCompletionRate: Share of days in the selected window where at least one task was marked completed on that calendar day.
reports.hintKpiTotalMarks: Sum of all completion marks in the window: each recurring occurrence closed on its day plus each completed one-off task counts once.
reports.hintChartDaily: Each bar is how many tasks were marked completed on that calendar day (recurring tasks count per occurrence; one-off tasks on their planned day). Today is not included in the chart window.
reports.hintFailedRecurring: Recurring series: how many scheduled occurrences in the window were missed (the day has passed and there is no completion for that date). Rows are grouped by series.
reports.hintFailedOneOff: One-off tasks whose planned date is in the past and which are still not marked done; shows up to five with the earliest planned dates in the window.
reports.dr013Body: The KPI above already reflects DR-013 once the ritual is completed and vault data satisfies the rule.
reports.failedRecurringTitle: Often missed: recurring (grouped by series, DR-008)
reports.failedOneOffTitle: One-off tasks with overdue plan (top 5 in window, DR-008)
reports.emptyFailed: Nothing to show for this window.

home.title: A planner that respects your rhythm
home.subtitle: Minimal web app: sign-in, client-side encryption, tasks.
home.docsHint: Docs — obsidian-motivator folder in the repo

login.subtitle: Tasks are encrypted on device; only ciphertext goes to the server.
login.confirmEmailInfo: Account created. Confirm your email from the message, then sign in. Check Spam if needed.
login.envHint: Set {{url}} and {{key}} in {{env}} and on Vercel.

onboarding.title: Encryption key
onboarding.intro: Seed is combined with a derivation password (optional in V1 — less secure). After sign-out the seed is cleared — to open the same tasks again, paste the same seed and derivation password as the first time.
onboarding.errSave: Could not save key. Try again.

vault.decryptError: Could not decrypt vault. Check seed and password.
